name: reels-feed
title: Reels Feed
description: Vertical-video content surface modeling Instagram Reels / TikTok / YouTube Shorts. Full-bleed media layer + black background + right-rail action stack (like / comment / share / save / more + creator avatar + spinning music disc) + bottom info zone (creator handle / Folgen button / caption / music attribution). Count formatter (1.2K / 12.4K / 1.2M) matches platform conventions. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for Experience-Page hero embeds. Includes AfGradientReel fallback media component for use when no real video is available.
